name: Han Xin

skills.name: Killing Spear
skills.description: Han Xin's every 4th Basic Attack launches the target. Hits from skills andenhanced Basic Attacks grant increased Attack Speed.

skills.name: Ruthless Assault
skills.description: Charges to the target location to deal damage and launch the enemy. The 2nd charge will not launch the enemy.

skills.name: Fight or Die!
skills.description: Shifts backward and enhances the next Basic Attack, causing it to deal extra damage.

skills.name: The Unrivaled Spear
skills.description: Swings spear 4 times, gaining immunity to damage and crowd control. Deals damage each time and launches enemies the 4th time.

tips: Han Xin (Assassin): Tier B on international ranked — 52.14% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Meteor, Boots of Resistance.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 52.14%, pick 0.6%, ban 0.2%, popularity tier B.
Counters Lu Bu, Dun, Xiang Yu · Weak into Agudo, Alessio, Erin.

faqs.question: Is Han Xin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Han Xin is Tier B Assassin with 52.14% win rate, 0.6% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Han Xin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Meteor, Boots of Resistance, Bloodsoul, Master Sword, Axe of Torment. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Han Xin?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Han Xin: Agudo, Alessio, Erin. Han Xin is strong into Lu Bu, Dun, Xiang Yu.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lu Bu, Dun, Xiang Yu. Countered by: Agudo, Alessio, Erin.
